message:
chore: ignore SQLite WAL/SHM files in sample databases

These ephemeral runtime files (beads.db-shm, beads.db-wal) appear
whenever a sample database is opened and should never be tracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -111,3 +111,7 @@ storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
 
 # Malformed workspace test directories (br test artifacts)
 br_malformed_*/
+
+# SQLite WAL/SHM files in sample databases
+sample_beads_db_files/**/*.db-shm
+sample_beads_db_files/**/*.db-wal
